doctrine: Quality is not what passed yesterday. Quality is what still survives today.

drift_categories.name: Source Control Drift
drift_categories.description: Working tree has uncommitted changes, untracked files, or missing required commits since last quality capture
drift_categories.severity_rule: CRITICAL if financial service; HIGH if HG-2B; MEDIUM if HG-2A; LOW if HG-1
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Run AEG-PROV-001 assertSourceControlProvenance; commit or stash uncommitted changes before next promotion

drift_categories.name: Test Evidence Drift
drift_categories.description: Tests that previously passed now fail, or no test evidence exists for the service
drift_categories.severity_rule: CRITICAL if financial service with failing tests; HIGH otherwise; LOW if no tests ever ran (pre-doctrine)
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Run test suite; capture exit code in next promotion artifact

drift_categories.name: Schema Drift
drift_categories.description: Prisma/schema file modified since last quality capture without corresponding migration artifact
drift_categories.severity_rule: CRITICAL if financial service; HIGH otherwise — schema drift = data integrity risk
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Run prisma migrate diff; document outcome; create migration if needed before next promotion

drift_categories.name: Codex Classification Drift
drift_categories.description: HG classification changed since last quality capture, or quality fields are absent/inconsistent
drift_categories.severity_rule: HIGH if classification changed without human override; MEDIUM if field naming mismatch only
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Reconcile codex.json fields; run claw-audit; update classification_batch to current batch

drift_categories.name: Documentation Drift
drift_categories.description: Live service state differs from codex, wiki, or proposal docs; doc hash changed without update
drift_categories.severity_rule: MEDIUM for most services; HIGH if the doc discrepancy affects compliance evidence
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Update deep-knowledge doc; record doc hash delta in next batch artifact

drift_categories.name: Audit Chain Drift
drift_categories.description: Codex references a batch number whose audit artifact does not exist, or existing artifact has verdict != PASS
drift_categories.severity_rule: HIGH — broken audit chain breaks the evidence moat
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Locate or regenerate missing batch artifact; if unrecoverable, declare pre_AEG_Q_001_legacy

drift_categories.name: Source Provenance Drift
drift_categories.description: AEG-PROV-001 assertSourceControlProvenance has not been run or returned non-zero
drift_categories.severity_rule: HIGH — provenance is the root of the evidence chain; its absence voids the chain
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Run assertSourceControlProvenance before next batch; add to pre-promotion gate

drift_categories.name: Security Evidence Drift
drift_categories.description: Financial/token files changed since last quality capture without secret scanner evidence
drift_categories.severity_rule: CRITICAL for financial services and services handling tokens/keys; HIGH otherwise
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Run truffleHog/gitleaks on git diff; record exit code in batch artifact; add to pre-promotion gate

drift_categories.name: Runtime Policy Drift
drift_categories.description: Service hard_gate_enabled state in policy differs from live roster expectation, or AEGIS env var mismatch
drift_categories.severity_rule: CRITICAL if financial service is not hard-gated; HIGH if live service is unexpectedly soft
drift_categories.remediation_hint: Check AEGIS_HARD_GATE_SERVICES env var; reconcile hard-gate-policy.ts with live roster

severity_model.description: Missing optional evidence — no compliance impact
examples: docs not updated for minor patch
lint evidence absent for HG-1 non-financial

severity_model.description: Pre-doctrine legacy gap — acknowledged, not actionable immediately
examples: quality_mask_at_promotion absent for HG-1 service promoted before Batch 89

severity_model.description: Docs/codex drift — observable inconsistency, fix in next batch
Financial/schema/secret/risk drift — evidence chain has material gap for a high-consequence service
examples: schema changed without migration evidence (financial service)
secret scan missing for token-handling service
